hero.description: I help businesses and teams optimize processes through web applications and automation. I build scalable, efficient solutions focused on real-world impact.

home.aboutSubtitle: Developer focused on building modern and scalable web solutions.

uscoDigiturno.title: USCO Digiturno
uscoDigiturno.subtitle: Queue management and operational control system for a university environment
uscoDigiturno.overview: Designed and implemented an internal system to manage queues for the Universidad Surcolombiana, centralizing attendance tracking, student registration, and real-time operational insights.
uscoDigiturno.problem: The process was manual, disorganized, and lacked traceability, leading to attendance errors, data loss, and inefficient queue management.
uscoDigiturno.solution: Built an internal web application deployed on a local network to manage queues, register students, and monitor attendance in real time. Implemented configurable metrics to identify peak hours and optimize workload distribution.
uscoDigiturno.role: Full-stack developer responsible for the entire project lifecycle: requirements gathering, system design, development, deployment, and documentation.

shopifyManagement.title: Shopify Store Optimization
shopifyManagement.subtitle: Performance and conversion improvements for e-commerce (dropshipping)
shopifyManagement.overview: Optimized two Shopify stores in the Colombian market, focusing on improving user experience, visual structure, and conversion metrics.
shopifyManagement.problem: The stores had low conversion rates, poor visual design, and an inefficient user experience that negatively impacted sales.
shopifyManagement.solution: Redesigned the UI and navigation structure, integrated strategic plugins, and optimized key elements of the conversion funnel. Improved performance metrics including load times and usability.
shopifyManagement.role: Led technical and visual optimization, implementing improvements and analyzing performance metrics focused on conversion.

aiEyeAnalysis.title: AI-Powered Eye Disease Analysis
aiEyeAnalysis.subtitle: Computer vision system for assisted medical diagnosis
aiEyeAnalysis.overview: Developed an AI-based system using a dataset of over 50,000 eye disease images, capable of analyzing corneal conditions in real time.
aiEyeAnalysis.problem: Early diagnosis of eye diseases requires specialized analysis, which is not always immediately accessible.
aiEyeAnalysis.solution: Trained a computer vision model using YOLO with over 1M parameters and integrated DeepSeek as a data processing API. Built an application that captures real-time eye data and provides predictions along with care recommendations.
aiEyeAnalysis.role: Developer and researcher responsible for data processing, model training, AI integration, and full application development.

impact.innovation: Integration of computer vision and AI APIs

jobs.description: Led the documentation and optimization of complex organizational processes, combining system analysis, agile methodologies, and strategic benchmarking to improve operational efficiency and decision-making.
achievements: Delivered 34 complex process documentations (145 deliverables) with 100% executive approval
Implemented Scrum across 5 phases and 8 sprints, ensuring structured delivery and stakeholder alignment
Conducted comparative analysis of 12 academic programs (MIT, Stanford, Andes), identifying 85 critical gaps
Prioritized 48 best practices using MoSCoW and ROI frameworks

jobs.description: Designed and implemented a digital queue management system (Digiturno) to optimize service flow, attendance tracking, and operational visibility in a university judicial environment.
achievements: Built a digital queue system improving service flow and user management
Developed attendance tracking module for staff monitoring
Generated analytical reports for operational decision-making
Reduced manual processes and improved service organization

jobs.description: Analyzed and modernized legacy systems, improving data integrity, user experience, and internal workflows through structured technical documentation and cross-team collaboration.
achievements: Diagnosed legacy systems and identified structural failures in critical modules
Improved data integrity and consistency across key operational systems
Documented modernization processes and system improvements
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to redesign UX and reduce access time

jobs.description: Worked on information security, infrastructure organization, and data integrity, implementing automated backup systems and supporting internal digital platforms.
achievements: Designed automated backup system for sensitive financial data
Improved data integrity, confidentiality, and availability
Organized internal network infrastructure and structured cabling
